report.project_summary:
This rectangular floor plan contains 15 rooms with a total area of 110.9 square meters. The structural analysis identified 19 load-bearing walls and 29 partition walls.

The overall structural integrity score is 36% with 0 critical issues and 11 warnings requiring attention. The maximum span of 3.2m is within acceptable limits.

The estimated construction cost is ₹2,558,488 (₹23,076/sqm), representing a potential savings of ₹1,021,726 compared to premium material options.

element_explanations.recommendation_text: Steel Frame (250.0 MPa compressive strength, ₹4000.0/sqm) is recommended for this partition. Chosen over AAC Block (Autoclaved) (4.0 MPa) for better structural performance.
element_explanations.tradeoff_summary: Score: 0.42. Key factors: Exterior wall - weather exposure, Part of continuous load path.

element_explanations.recommendation_text: Precast Concrete Panel (Commercial) (30.0 MPa compressive strength, ₹2400.0/sqm) is recommended for this partition. Chosen over AAC Block (Autoclaved) (4.0 MPa) for better structural performance.
element_explanations.tradeoff_summary: Score: 0.56. Key factors: Exterior wall - weather exposure, Part of continuous load path.

element_explanations.recommendation_text: Precast Concrete Panel (Residential) (25.0 MPa compressive strength, ₹1700.0/sqm) is recommended for this partition. Chosen over AAC Block (Autoclaved) (4.0 MPa) for better structural performance.
element_explanations.tradeoff_summary: Score: 0.63. Key factors: Exterior wall - weather exposure, Part of continuous load path.

optimization_suggestions.title: TOILET too narrow
optimization_suggestions.description: TOILET has aspect ratio of 3.4:1. Consider making it more square for better usability.

optimization_suggestions.title: Multiple structural spines
optimization_suggestions.description: Found 7 structural spines. Consider consolidating for simpler construction.

report.overall_assessment:
Based on the comprehensive analysis, this floor plan demonstrates acceptable structural integrity. The design appears suitable for residential construction with the recommended materials.

Key recommendations: Address the 11 identified warnings, consider the 2 optimization suggestions for potential cost savings, and ensure proper material specifications during construction.
report.methodology_notes: Analysis performed using VLM+CV fusion parsing, graph-based geometry analysis, and multi-criteria material optimization. (Mock mode - LLM explanations disabled)
limitations: Scale detection accuracy depends on image quality
Regional material cost variations not accounted for
Professional structural review recommended for construction
